div.h2: Data Flow: 64-byte Block → 16 Big-Endian Words → 64 Schedule Words

div.p: Final W[64] array (256 bytes) Consumed by sha256_compress(): one word W[t] per round, t = 0..63

Recurrence (FIPS 180-4 §6.2.2): W[t] = σ₁(W[t-2]) + W[t-7] + σ₀(W[t-15]) + W[t-16] σ₀ constants: ROTR×7, ROTR×18, SHR×3 σ₁ constants: ROTR×17, ROTR×19, SHR×10 + = addition mod 2^32 (uint32_t wraps in C)
